Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: suit of formal clothing, silk hat, handkerchief
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, short black hair, brown eyes, thin build, average-looking features with a deep outline, scholarly air, wearing a linen shirt
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Claims to have lost recent memories (amnesia)
Klein Moretti.role: Civilian staff at Blackthorn Security Company
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Text describes his childhood memories and his mother's religious habits.

Dunn Smith.face_description: A mature face with a slightly high hairline and deep, abstruse gray eyes. His expression is often calm, sometimes featuring a polite but unusual smile.
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: late 30s male, fair skin, short dark brown hair with a high receding hairline, deep gray eyes, wearing a black top hat and a knee-length black trench coat, holding a tobacco pipe
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: Enjoys smoking tobacco mixed with mint leaves
Dunn Smith.accessories: pipe, gorgeous golden pocket watch on a golden chain
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Text explicitly states he wore a black trench coat with a golden pocket watch on a chain, smoked a pipe, and had gray eyes.

Rozanne.face_description: Bright forehead and light-brown eyes, often seen with a sweet and friendly smile.

Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream

Naya.primary_clothing: Modest Victorian scholar's dress, high collar, dark green wool
